channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Collingwood seeks to clear Billy Frampton ahead of key Carlton clash
item.description: The article details Collingwood's efforts to have Billy Frampton cleared of a suspension ahead of their crucial AFL match against the Carlton Blues. Frampton's potential return could bolster the team'...

item.title: U.S. diplomatic efforts in Africa focus on regional stability and U.S.-Sahel relations
item.description: The article details the ongoing diplomatic engagements of the United States with African nations, particularly focusing on its interactions with the Sahel region. Key points include the appointment of...

item.title: Retired Portfolio Manager Tony Genua Returns to Ninepoint Partners
item.description: Tony Genua, a 71-year-old award-winning portfolio manager, has rejoined the financial services industry after retiring in 2024. He has taken on the role of lead manager for Ninepoint Global Select Fun...

item.title: Paul Caneiro's Legal Marriage Status and Life Sentence Details
item.description: Paul Caneiro, a former tech executive convicted of murdering his brother and family in 2018, remains legally married to his wife Susan despite serving a life prison sentence without parole. The articl...

item.title: New Zealand Actor Sam Neill, 'Jurassic Park' Star, Dies at 78
item.description: New Zealand actor Sam Neill, renowned for his role as paleontologist Dr. Alan Grant in the 'Jurassic Park' film series, has passed away at the age of 78. His family announced his death through a socia...

item.title: Trump's Middle East Strategy Lacks Effective Plan
item.description: The article critiques Donald Trump's approach to the Middle East conflict, highlighting his ineffective strategy in dealing with Iran. It references the 1979 Iranian Revolution, where the U.S. failed ...

item.title: Tanzania Launches New Vehicle Inspection System with Mandatory Fees for Owners
item.description: The Tanzanian government has introduced a new vehicle inspection system that requires all motorists to undergo updated safety checks. This framework aims to modernize road compliance measures by incor...

item.title: Investigation into the mysterious death of Ann Widdecombe reveals local arrests and unanswered questions
item.description: The article explores the enigmatic circumstances surrounding the death of Ann Widdecombe, a prominent British television personality and former MP. Following her passing, authorities launched an inves...

item.title: Sen. Rick Scott Calls for Senate Reform to Address Productivity and Legislative Delays
item.description: Sen. Rick Scott criticizes the U.S. Senate's declining productivity, arguing that lawmakers should emulate the work ethic of American workers who dedicate five days a week to their jobs. He highlights...

item.title: New antiracism policies for universities announced by education minister
item.description: The article discusses new antiracism measures being implemented by Australian universities, with the education minister warning that further actions are likely. These policies aim to address systemic ...

item.title: Kilifi Pastors Hold Cleansing Prayers at Lost Beach Following Summer Tides Festival
item.description: Religious leaders from Kilifi County gathered at Lost Beach in Malindi after the Summer Tides Festival to perform cleansing prayers, targeting what they called evil covenants and immoral activities li...

item.title: Opinion columnist argues Trump's social media post combined longstanding attacks on Obama, race, and Islam
item.description: This opinion article argues that a recent Truth Social post by President Donald Trump reflects what the author describes as three recurring themes in Trump's public messaging: criticism of former Pres...

item.title: Ogie Reacts to Ralph's Actions on 'It’s Showtime'
item.description: The article discusses Ogie Alcasid's public reaction to Ralph De Leon's recent actions during a segment on the Philippine television show 'It’s Showtime'. While the exact nature of Ralph's behavior is...

item.title: Arsenal and Atletico Madrid in transfer tug-of-war over Julian Alvarez
item.description: Arsenal has intensified its pursuit of Atletico Madrid forward Julian Alvarez, aiming to finalize the transfer before pre-season begins. The Gunners are capitalizing on Atletico's refusal to sell to B...

item.title: Regional media decline contributes to misinformation and political rise
item.description: The article highlights the collapse of regional media in Australia, driven by declining investment, job cuts, and the centralisation of newsrooms. This exodus has created an environment ripe for misin...

item.title: Palace Condemns Davao Mayor's Alleged False Claims
item.description: The Philippine government's Palace has strongly condemned the actions of a certain individual named Baste, accusing the Davao City mayor of disseminating false information. This statement comes amid o...

item.title: Leadership Crisis at Federal Agency as Replacement Dispute Persists
item.description: A leadership crisis is unfolding in the Border Communities Development Agency (BCDA) over conflicting appointments. Governorship aspirant Dakorinama Alabo George, who resigned to contest for a Rivers ...

item.title: Tragedy as Child Drowns in Calgary Pond
item.description: A child drowned in a pond in the Legacy neighbourhood of Calgary on Sunday afternoon, according to Emergency Health Services (EHS) and the Calgary Fire Department (CFD). The incident occurred around 1...

item.title: Leadership crisis at BCDA: Wike's ally defies Tinubu's directive to stay in office
item.description: A leadership crisis is brewing at the Border Communities Development Agency (BCDA) as Dr Dakorinama Alabo George, a governorship aspirant under the APC in Rivers State, remains in office despite being...

item.title: Sam Neill, Jurassic Park Star, Passes Away at 78 After Cancer Battle
item.description: Sam Neill, the iconic actor known for his role as Dr. Alan Grant in Jurassic Park, has passed away at 78 after a courageous battle with cancer. His family confirmed his death on Monday, 13 July, in Sy...
